violations.text: The following areas of the Physical Facilities were observed in need of repair... - The ceiling over the dishwashing area was observed to be pealing - The tile floor in the dishwashing area was observed to be cracked and loosening Physical Facilities are to be maintained in good repair. (At the time of inspection, plans for repairing the ceiling and floor, and proper materials for inddor area surfaces were discussed.) New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Potatoes (Home Fries) were observed held at 100 degrees Fahrenheit in a pan on the cook top. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Due to observation of temperature and time prepared, PIC was instructed to reheat and keep a portion hot on the cooktop, and rapidly cool the remaining for later use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The tile floor in the back kitchen area is in poor repair (observed to be cracked/chipped/missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
